results.title: PM Narendra Modi Speaks At Bharat Innovates Event
results.description: PM Narendra Modi Speaks At Bharat Innovates Event #narendramodi #bharatinnovates #modispeaks #otvnewsenglish #otvnews --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- OdishaTV is Odisha's no 1 News Channel. OTV being the first private satellite TV channel in Odisha carries the onus of charting a course that behoves its pioneering efforts. Accordingly its charter objectives are FREE, FAIR and UNBIASED. OTV delivers reliable information across all platforms: TV, Internet and Mobile. Stay tuned for all the breaking news ! results.title: Bannerghatta Biological Park Welcomes Cheetahs from South Africa, Records Birth of Zebra Foal and Hippo Call
results.description: Bannerghatta Biological Park celebrates a wave of success as new cheetahs open for public viewing and a zebra foal and hippo calf join the park. Learn more about BBP’s latest milestones in wildlife conservation and breeding.
